narrative:
Precinct Bettsville Village (precinct in Seneca County) has 394 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a clear Republican lean of 10.7 percentage points.
